title: [cross-impl] unresolved merge conflicts in lichen-core/src/announce.rs
description: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs contains git conflict markers (<<<<<<< HEAD, =======, >>>>>>> origin/worktree-worker24) from CCP-9 rx_channel integration. Python announce/messages.py puts rx_channel at wire offset 93 (post-sig) and signs iid+pubkey+seq+rx+appdata. Rust has conflicting from_bytes() (data[1] flags vs data[93]) and signed_data(). Breaks interop and same-algorithm behavior across Python/Rust/Zephyr. Discovered during crossimpl review of recent integration merges (convergence-20260721, interop-fail-closed).
